creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 185732
patch for print/epson-inkjet-printer-escpr

ESC/P-R Driver (generic driver) Ver. 1.6.14 was released in 2017-08-17.

added support for L364 Series (1.6.10).
The version of the tools were downgraded (1.6.11).
automake 1.11.3 -> 1.11.1
autoconf 2.68 -> 2.65
libtool 2.4.2 -> 2.2.6b
But it has no effect because USES=autoreconf is used.
added support for ET-2600 Series, ET-2650 Series, L395 Series and L495 Series (1.6.11).
added support for XP-340 Series (1.6.12).
end of support for L380 Series and L382 Series (1.6.13).
added support for ET-2610 Series, L405 Series, L3050 Series, L3060 Series, L3070 Series, XP-540 Series and XP-640 Series (1.6.14).

MASTER_SITES is changed. The distfile will download from download center directly. It can use because There was no change in URL of distfile 1.6.13 between 2017-03-23 and 2017-08-11. It is the same as a print/epson-inkjet-printer-201401w.

To Mr. Hiroki Sato (hrs@FreeBSD) and to Mr. Kurt Jaeger (pi@FreeBSD)
Thank you for preparing the distfile.
